name: inhouse
description: Your company's private web, on your Cloudflare account.

scripts.build: bun run assets:embed && bun run build.mjs
scripts.dev: bun run build && wrangler dev --local --port 8798 -c wrangler.local.jsonc
scripts.dry-run: bun run build && wrangler deploy --dry-run --outdir dist
scripts.check: bun run build && bun run typecheck && bun run test && biome check .
scripts.deploy:docs: bun run check && wrangler deploy -c wrangler.docs.jsonc
scripts.deploy:app: bun run check && wrangler deploy -c wrangler.production.jsonc

ASSETS.description: Private R2 bucket containing immutable site deployments.

POLICY_AUD.description: Audience tag of the Access application protecting Inhouse.

CONTROL_HOST.description: Exact hostname for the control plane.
